PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetProducesStatementImpl(PRODUCES_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(PRODUCES)('produces')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetConsumesStatementImpl(CONSUMES_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(CONSUMES)('consumes')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetProducesStatementImpl(PRODUCES_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(PRODUCES)('produces')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetConsumesStatementImpl(CONSUMES_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(CONSUMES)('consumes')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('File')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetProducesStatementImpl(PRODUCES_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(PRODUCES)('produces')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiPuppetBracedAnyArgumentsListBlockImpl(BRACED_ANY_ARGUMENTS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetResourceArgumentsListImpl(RESOURCE_ARGUMENTS_LIST)
        PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('key')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('var')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetArgumentImpl(ARGUMENT)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('otherkey')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
            PsiElement($)('$')
            PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('othervar')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetConsumesStatementImpl(CONSUMES_STATEMENT)
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(CONSUMES)('consumes')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('file')
